name: cpp_task_demo
title: C++ task demo
short_description: Minimal C++ example task - busy-loop integer increment throughput.

structured_text.description: A tight C++ loop that increments an `std::atomic<std::uint64_t>` (relaxed) over the budgeted runtime, measured with `std::chrono::steady_clock`. The throughput is reported in millions of operations per second.
structured_text.metric_explanation: Throughput = total integer-increment operations divided by elapsed wall-clock time, in Mops/s.
structured_text.value_interpretation: Higher values indicate a faster single-thread integer pipeline. Equivalent workload to `rust_task_demo` and `c_task_demo`; the trio illustrates idiomatic implementation in each language.
structured_text.reasoning: Serves as the canonical C++ reference for new task authors. Demonstrates the C++ RAII wrapper layered on top of the same C ABI used by `c_task_demo`.

domain_gaming.explanation: Single-thread integer throughput modestly influences game-engine update loops.

domain_office.explanation: Productivity workloads are dominated by I/O and latency, not raw ALU throughput.

domain_software_development.explanation: Compilers and developer tools are heavily ALU-bound; integer throughput is a strong proxy.

domain_graphics_design.explanation: Photo / raster work uses some CPU integer paths; mostly GPU and memory-bound.

domain_video_editing.explanation: Some integer-bound encoding stages; mostly hardware-accelerated.

domain_3d_rendering.explanation: Scene traversal and BVH walks lean on integer throughput.

domain_audio_production.explanation: DSP graph dispatch involves significant single-thread integer work.

domain_cad_engineering.explanation: Mesh operations and solver bookkeeping rely on integer ALU paths.

domain_scientific_computing.explanation: Mixed FP+integer kernels; index arithmetic is integer-bound.

domain_ai_training.explanation: Mostly GPU; host integer throughput affects data-loader pipelines.

domain_ai_inference.explanation: Tokenisation and orchestration use CPU integer paths.

domain_data_science.explanation: Dataframe ops dispatch via integer-heavy kernels.

domain_server_virt.explanation: Many concurrent processes amplify per-core integer throughput.
